page_metadata.biotools__summary: An image explainer that automizes image segmentation. Ensemble-based Genetic Algorithm Explainer (EGAE) for melanoma cancer detection that automatically detects and presents the informative sections of the image to the user.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: An image explainer that automizes image segmentation. Ensemble-based Genetic Algorithm Explainer (EGAE) for melanoma cancer detection that automatically detects and presents the informative sections of the image to the user.
